caveats: Unofficial API surface — not a public data product. Behavior may change.
Uses Cloudflare-protected endpoints. Requires cloudscraper.
Rate limits and pagination limits not documented.
Completed trades window is count-capped at 50 per item/segment (rolling_recent_trades_50_cap). No historical API backfill exists.
nextPage is a boolean cursor, not sequential pagination. All pages return the same 50 listings.
History is accumulated via scheduled (4x daily) snapshot collection. No pre-snapshot history is available.
next_action: Maintain scheduled snapshot pipeline. Regenerate products from accumulated history periodically.
